services.name: pub.parquet:closeBatchIterator
services.description: WmParquet. Closes the Parquet iterator. The Parquet iterator object, which is obtained from the pub.parquet:getBatchIterator service, cannot be used after running this service.

input_parameters.name: iterator
input_parameters.description: Object The iterator object returned by the pub.parquet:getBatchIterator service.

services.name: pub.parquet:documentTypeToSchema
services.description: WmParquet. Converts an Integration Server document type to the Parquet schema format. This service enables you to create a Parquet schema that can be passed to the pub.parquet:write service.

input_parameters.name: docTypeName
input_parameters.description: String The fully qualified name of an IS document type.

output_parameters.name: schema
output_parameters.description: String A Parquet schema for the given IS document type.

services.name: pub.parquet:getBatchIterator
services.description: WmParquet. Reads a Parquet file and returns a batch iterator object that can be used to iterate over the records in the Parquet file.

input_parameters.name: fileName
input_parameters.description: String Name of the Parquet file to be read.

output_parameters.name: iterator
output_parameters.description: Object An iterator object that can be used to iterate over the records in the Parquet file.

services.name: pub.parquet:getNextBatch
services.description: WmParquet. Gets the next batch of Parquet records from the iterator object returned by the pub.parquet:getBatchIterator service. This service returns records based on the batch size (batchSize) provided as input. The batch size can vary across invocations of the service.

input_parameters.name: iterator
input_parameters.description: Object The iterator object from which the records have to be retrieved. This object is obtained from the pub.parquet:getBatchIterator service.

input_parameters.name: batchSize
input_parameters.description: String. Number of records to be fetched in the current iteration.

output_parameters.name: records
output_parameters.description: Document List A batch of Parquet records converted to an IData array. The number of records returned is less than or equal to the batchSize parameter.

output_parameters.name: iterationStatus
output_parameters.description: Document Details about the iteration are provided in the following fields:

output_parameters.name: hasNext
output_parameters.description: String. Returns true if the iterator has more records to read after this iteration.

output_parameters.name: iteration
output_parameters.description: String The current iteration count, with the first iteration being 1.

output_parameters.name: noOfElementsInBatch
output_parameters.description: String The number of records retrieved in the current iteration.

output_parameters.name: totalElementsProccesed
output_parameters.description: String Total number of records retrieved till the current iteration (including the current noOfElementsInBatch).

usage_notes: The getNextBatch service may run into a memory limitation when reading a batch with a large number of records. Consider using a smaller batch size or allocating more memory to the Integration Server instance.

services.name: pub.parquet:read
services.description: WmParquet. Reads a Parquet file and converts it to an IData array (Document list).

input_parameters.name: fileName
input_parameters.description: String Name of the Parquet file to be read.

output_parameters.name: records
output_parameters.description: Document List An array of IData objects containing Parquet records. The tables Mapping of Parquet basic types to Integration Server data types and Mapping of Parquet logical types to Integration Server data types list how Parquet data types map to Integration Server data types.

usage_notes: The following tables list how Parquet data types are converted to Integration Server data types.

services.name: pub.parquet:write
services.description: WmParquet. Writes a document list (an array of IData objects) to a Parquet file.

input_parameters.name: fileName
input_parameters.description: String Name of the Parquet file to which the records will be written.

input_parameters.name: schema
input_parameters.description: String Optional. A Parquet schema against which the documents will be matched before the records are written to the file. If a schema is not provided, an IS document type must be provided using the docTypeName parameter. If any of provided documents do not conform to the given schema exactly, an exception is thrown.

input_parameters.name: docTypeName
input_parameters.description: String Optional. The fully qualified name of an IS document type. A document type can be provided instead of the schema parameter. The document type is converted to a Parquet schema internally and used for converting and writing the Parquet file. The tables Mapping of Integration Serverdata types to Parquet basic types for write operations and Mapping of Integration Server data types to Parquet Logical types list howIntegration Server data types map to Parquet schema types. Note: Either a schema or a docTypeName must be provided to validate the data before it is written to the Parquet file.

input_parameters.name: records
input_parameters.description: Document List Array of IData objects to be written to the Parquet file.

input_parameters.name: options
input_parameters.description: Document. Optional. Options such as compression methods can be passed to this service.

input_parameters.name: compressionCodec
input_parameters.description: String Optional. The following compression methods are supported: gzip snappy uncompressed Note: If a compressionCodec is not provided then data is not compressed.

usage_notes: The following tables list how Integration Server data types map to Parquet types.
